backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Suraj Navodaya App backend with user profile management, student/notice/exam/ad CRUD operations, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the login/authentication redesign feature to its implementation files (App.tsx and LoginScreen.tsx) with associated components and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose within the Suraj Navodaya App.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including maroon/gold color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Suraj Navodaya App' and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state — showing a loading spinner, LoginScreen, or the full app layout (Header, routed pages, Footer) based on Internet Identity status.
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: Reusable presentational component that renders a centered icon, title, and description for empty list states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer displaying the 'Suraj Navodaya App' brand name, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky maroon header with school branding, a desktop nav bar, and a mobile hamburger menu, including navigation links for Home, Students, Notice Board, Exam Schedule, and Advertisements.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Renders the login screen for Suraj Navodaya school management system with an Internet Identity login button, school emblem, and feature highlights (students, notices, exams).
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: A reusable page header component that displays a title, optional subtitle, optional icon, and an optional action element.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on students, notices, exams, and ads by calling the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the Navodaya maroon-and-gold theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Advertisements.tsx: Page component for managing advertisements, displaying ad cards with active/inactive toggle, image preview, and a dialog form for adding new ads.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSchedule.tsx: React page for displaying and adding exam schedules, with a sortable table, loading skeletons, and a dialog form that validates and submits new exams via the useAddExam hook.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Dashboard home page showing stat cards (students, notices, exams, ads) and preview lists of recent notices, upcoming exams, and active ads, with navigation callbacks and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/NoticesBoard.tsx: React page for viewing and adding school notices, displaying them as expandable cards sorted by date, with a dialog form for creating new notices via the useAddNotice hook.
frontend/src/pages/Students.tsx: React page for listing and adding students, featuring a search filter, house-colored student cards with initials avatars, and a dialog form that validates and submits new students via the useAddStudent hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them to sessionStorage, retrieve persisted values, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Merriweather, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens (including maroon and gold palettes), dark mode support, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Suraj Navodaya App project, recording existing features (login section redesign with maroon/gold branding) and a pending new request (AR-1) to further change/update the login section.
